Table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Card of table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Name

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Code

TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

 

T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_PAYMENT

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

full_payload_orderNo AS ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK,

full_payload_paymentDetail_authorisationCode AS AUTHORIZATION_ID_BK,

Country AS COUNTRY_CODE,

Full_Payload_Customer_Customerno AS IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER,

full_payload_orderTimestamp AS ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME,

full_payload_isPayPerLink AS PAY_PER_LINK_FLAG,

full_payload_paymentDetail_authAmount AS TOTAL_AMOUNT_LOCAL_CURRENCY,

full_payload_paymentDetail_authorisationDate AS AUTHORIZATION_DATETIME,

full_payload_paymentDetail_authorisationRef AS AUTHORIZATION_REFERENCE,

full_payload_paymentDetail_cardOwner AS CARD_OWNER,

full_payload_paymentDetail_creditCard AS CARD_ISSUER,

full_payload_paymentDetail_paymentToken AS PAYMENT_TOKEN,

full_payload_paymentDetail_paymentType AS PAYMENT_TYPE,

full_payload_paymentType AS PAYMENT_TYPE_2,

full_payload_paymentDetail_pspRequestId AS PSP_IDENTIFIER,

full_payload_paymentStatus AS PAYMENT_STATUS,

payment_method AS PAYMENT_METHOD,

CASE

WHEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) IS NOT NULL

AND COUNT(*) OVER (

PARTITION BY FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERNO,

full_payload_paymentDetail_authorisationCode,

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP

) = 1

THEN TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP)

ELSE __LOAD_TS

END AS VALID_FROM

-- [remaining technical columns]

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_ORDER_EXPORT_PAYMENT

WHERE

(

FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP IS NULL

OR TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP_NTZ(FULL_PAYLOAD_ORDERTIMESTAMP) <= __LOAD_TS

)

;

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: full_payload_orderNo, full_payload_paymentDetail_authorisationCode

Primary key(s) Target: ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, AUTHORIZATION_ID_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2 (use COALESCE(full_payload_orderTimestamp, __load_ts) as a reference for record versioning)

 

----------

RLS

----------

RLS v2 add join to MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER to sharing script

 

SELECT o.*

FROM TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT o

LEFT JOIN MDE_GIGYA_CONSUMER c

ON c.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER_BK = o.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER

AND o.VALID_FROM >= c.VALID_FROM

AND o.VALID_FROM < c.VALID_TO

WHERE

c.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES)

OR o.COUNTRY_CODE IN (#RLS_LIST_OF_COUNTRIES);

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

CKT_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_


Server validation rule of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

%RULES%


Code preview of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

drop table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT
--==============================================================
create or replace table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT (
ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK TEXT not null,
AUTHORIZATION_ID_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE TEXT not null,
IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
PAY_PER_LINK_FLAG FLAG,
TOTAL_AMOUNT_LOCAL_CURRENCY DECIMAL,
AUTHORIZATION_DATETIME DATETIME,
AUTHORIZATION_REFERENCE TEXT,
CARD_OWNER TEXT,
CARD_ISSUER TEXT,
PAYMENT_TOKEN TEXT,
PAYMENT_TYPE TEXT,
PAYMENT_TYPE_2 TEXT,
PSP_IDENTIFIER TEXT,
PAYMENT_STATUS TEXT,
PAYMENT_METHOD TEXT,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_P primary key (ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK, AUTHORIZATION_ID_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT set comment = 'This table keeps track of payment details concerning each order. It contains information about payment amount, date, method and initiator.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.ORDER_IDENTIFIER_BK is
'Order number / identifier of the order';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.AUTHORIZATION_ID_BK is
'Anonymized ID of the card created during checkout process';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.COUNTRY_CODE is
'2 letters ISO country code';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.IDENTITY_UNIQUE_IDENTIFIER is
'Customer number';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.ORDER_CREATION_DATETIME is
'Time of the order creation';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.PAY_PER_LINK_FLAG is
'Flag which indicates the pay per link option, boolean: "true" or "false"';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.TOTAL_AMOUNT_LOCAL_CURRENCY is
'Total amount in local currency paid by the consumer';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.AUTHORIZATION_DATETIME is
'Payment authorisation timestamp.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.AUTHORIZATION_REFERENCE is
'Anonymized ID of the card created during checkout process';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.CARD_OWNER is
'Owner of the  credit card';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.CARD_ISSUER is
'Credit card issuer and not the credit card number; required for reporting on preferred card providers and for fraud monitoring';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.PAYMENT_TOKEN is
'Identifier code generated when an online payment is made';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.PAYMENT_TYPE is
'Payment method selected by the consumer or defined by the order channel.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.PAYMENT_TYPE_2 is
'Payment method selected by the consumer or defined by the order channel.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.PSP_IDENTIFIER is
'Identifier of PSP system request';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.PAYMENT_STATUS is
'Final status of the order payment.';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.PAYMENT_METHOD is
'Method of payment';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.VALID_TO is
'It indicates When the record is no longer Active ';

comment on column TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the Record is Active';

Column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

VALID_FROM: SCD Type 2 start timestamp selected via cascading fallback- use full_payload_orderTimestamp; if null/invalid or not granular enough (identical across records) fall back to technical __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

CKC_VALID_FROM_TDE_HYBR


Check of the column VALID_FROM of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Maximum Value

 

Default Value

 

Unit

 

Format

 

Cannot Modify

No

Snowflake


Column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

VALID_TO: SCD2 end timestamp. Use the same cascade as VALID_FROM (full_payload_orderTimestamp → __LOAD_TS) to find the next change; if none exists (current row), set 9999-12-31.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

CKC_VALID_TO_TDE_HYBR


Check of the column VALID_TO of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Card of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table TDE_HYBRIS_CONSUMER_ORDER_PAYMENT
